'''zhatuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draconin|draconin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draconin|draconin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhatuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhætiyith|zhætiyith]] || [[word:zhætiyij|zhætiyij]] || [[word:zhætiyish|zhætiyish]] || [[word:zhætiyi|zhætiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatutuyuth|zhatutuyuth]] || [[word:zhatutuyuj|zhatutuyuj]] || [[word:zhatutuyush|zhatutuyush]] || [[word:zhatutuyu|zhatutuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatuyuth|zhatuyuth]] || [[word:zhatuyuj|zhatuyuj]] || [[word:zhatuyush|zhatuyush]] || [[word:zhatuyu|zhatuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatufyuth|zhatufyuth]] || [[word:zhatufyuj|zhatufyuj]] || [[word:zhatufyush|zhatufyush]] || [[word:zhatufyuf|zhatufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatuyuthu|zhatuyuthu]] || [[word:zhatuyuju|zhatuyuju]] || [[word:zhatuyushu|zhatuyushu]] || [[word:zhatuyuku|zhatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatuyuth|zhatuyuth]] || [[word:zhatuyuj|zhatuyuj]] || [[word:zhatuyush|zhatuyush]] || [[word:zhatuyu|zhatuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatuyuthul|zhatuyuthul]] || [[word:zhatuyujul|zhatuyujul]] || [[word:zhatuyushul|zhatuyushul]] || [[word:zhatuyukul|zhatuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatuyuthuthu|zhatuyuthuthu]] || [[word:zhatuyujuju|zhatuyujuju]] || [[word:zhatuyushushu|zhatuyushushu]] || [[word:zhatuyuku|zhatuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatuyuthun|zhatuyuthun]] || [[word:zhatuyujun|zhatuyujun]] || [[word:zhatuyushun|zhatuyushun]] || [[word:zhatuyukun|zhatuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatuyuthuoro|zhatuyuthuoro]] || [[word:zhatuyujuoro|zhatuyujuoro]] || [[word:zhatuyushuoro|zhatuyushuoro]] || [[word:zhatuyukuoro|zhatuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
